text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So I did it... I actually beat Sis!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well done, Brian. You're extraordinary. You
outran reason and logic.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined you'd compete in the
Takarazuka Kinen in your classic year.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And the raw talent you displayed tells me you still
have the potential for further growth.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's truly frightening to think of where you'll be by
the end of summer. It seems that you're out ahead
of me for good.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...But this isn't the end, you know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I want to race at least one more time. If it's as
heart-pounding as today, then...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is the Twinkle Series, where every racer
pushes forward and aims for the top.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's race again. Next time, I'll be the one
showing you my back!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Deal. I'll beat you next time too!
